DECLARATION OF JESSICA A. LUKE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES (TRANSACTION ID # 200044292) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE LEGAL, LLC

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-21-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES. JESSICA LUKE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/7/22 IS CONTINUED TO 8/1/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 8/1/22 TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100169535) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAPLIN, NIKOLAS
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-13-2022 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
